nasb.text: David swore to Saul. And Saul went to his home, but David and his men went up to the stronghold.

esv.text: And David swore this to Saul. Then Saul went home, but David and his men went up to the stronghold.

cnv.text: 於是大衛向掃羅起誓，掃羅就回自己的家去了，大衛和跟隨他的人也上山寨去了。

ccb.text: 大卫便向扫罗起誓。之后，扫罗回家了，大卫和部下也回堡垒去了。
